title: Performance / Load test
notes: Bearer token used was a placeholder; protected endpoints returned 401 but latency is still measured. Health responded 200. No 5xx, no >5s timeouts in 190 total requests.

cold_start.expected: first request 2-3s OK; we got 364ms (already warm or fast cold start)

tests.label: products_get
tests.issue: All 401 due to placeholder bearer token; with valid JWT expect similar latency profile.

tests.label: health_get
tests.note: p95 277ms < 300ms target. Health endpoint healthy under burst.

tests.label: login_post
tests.note: p95 427ms < 800ms target; p99 748ms still under target.

summary.caveat: products_get and sales_post measured against placeholder bearer (401 responses). Latency itself meets targets; functional auth path needs re-run with valid JWT.
summary.verdict: Production endpoint performant: zero 5xx, zero >5s timeouts, all p99 < 800ms across 190 parallel/burst requests. Cold start 364ms (well under 2-3s budget), warm 264ms (<500ms target), health p95 278ms (<300ms target), login p95 428ms (<800ms target).
